title: Minecraft Roguelike
description: Turns Minecraft into a roguelike game with 20 Ascension levels (supports both multiplayer and singleplayer)
body:
This datapack turns the game into a co-op roguelike with 20 ascension levels. The core concept is that all players are linked, which is why the first ascension level links all player's health (while it is a "co-op roguelike", there is no upper or lower limit for the amount of players, which is to say that the datapack will still work in singleplayer).

The ascension level, as well as the game difficulty, can be changed using "Trigger" commands.

# Ascension levels
1: All Players Share a Health Bar

2: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

No Enchanted Items

</details>


3: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

No Diamonds or Diamond Items

</details>


4: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Health Bar Is Limited to 7.5 Hearts

</details>


5: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Villager Trading Is Disabled

</details>


6: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Container Loot Will Not Generate

</details>


7: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

All Players Must Play as Vegetarians

</details>


8: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The Offhand Is Disabled

</details>


9: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

All Players Share a Single Inventory

</details>


10: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Inventory Is Limited to 2 Rows

</details>


11: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The World Is limited to 3000 Blocks in each Direction

</details>


12: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

No Bows or Arrows

</details>


13: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

No Potions

</details>


14: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

No Armor

</details>


15: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Health Bar Is Limited to 5 Hearts

</details>


16: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Inventory Is Limited to 1 Row

</details>


17: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

No Shield

</details>


18: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Only Wooden Tools (Not Counting Stone Pickaxe)

</details>


19: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Hotbar Only

</details>


20: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Free the End and Kill the Wither

</details>




# (/Trigger) Commands

### /Trigger Ascension
This command will change the Ascension level according to your input

### /Trigger Difficulty
This command will change the game Difficulty (Easy, Normal and Hard) according to your input. The default Difficulty is Easy.

### /Trigger Location
_(Cannot be used in singleplayer)_ This command will write the location of all other players in the chat (only you will be able to see the messages)


# Notes
- This datapack does not work on realms servers
- The world has to be closed when adding the datapack. It will not work if you add it while the world is open and then use the /reload command
- The datapack has a "settings" fodler where you can turn off command explanations and PvP
- You cannot use beds and respawn anchors to cheese the dragon fight
- Each run of an ascension has to be done in a seperate minecraft world. The datapack cannot reset the world for you
- You win by completing the *goal* which is displayed whenever a new Ascension level is chosen
- When you generate a world you will be locked in a 5x5 box, which you can only leave after choosing an ascension level. The ascension level and game diffuclty can be changed until a player receives a root advancement
- You cannot obtain totems of undying

Please do message me on discord if you find an issue.
